description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a classic, slightly bulging cylindrical shape and a wide open top. The exterior is composed of vertical wooden staves, each separated by subtle grooves, and the structure is reinforced by two thick, dark bands encircling the upper and lower thirds of the barrel. The wood has a dark brown finish, giving it a weathered, rustic appearance suitable for urban or industrial settings. The bands appear to be made of metal, providing both structural integrity and a visual contrast to the wood. The interior is hollow, making it suitable for storage or containment of various materials. There are no visible handles, lids, or markings on the surface.
description: A dark brown wooden barrel with metal reinforcement bands and a wide open top, featuring a rustic, weathered look. The barrel is hollow and lacks handles, lids, or exterior markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, vertical wooden staves, and both upper and lower metal bands clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the same features visible, but the curvature of the barrel is more pronounced on the left side.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with the right side curvature more visible and the metal bands still prominent.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the open top and both metal bands visible, showing no additional features.
